auth.brandUniversity: VIETNAM NATIONAL UNIVERSITY HO CHI MINH CITY
auth.brandSchool: Ho Chi Minh City University of Technology (HCMUT)
auth.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
auth.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 4 characters

errors.registerMissingFields: Please enter username, password, and class code
errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 4 characters
errors.invalidClassCodeApi: Invalid class code (use IS-1, IS-2, or IS-3)
errors.registerOfflineOnly: Registration uses the API only. Set VITE_ENABLE_MOCK_AUTH=true for offline demo mode.
errors.network: Could not reach the server. Check the API URL and that the backend is running.
errors.profileLearnerOnly: Only learner accounts can update this profile
errors.profileDuplicate: Email or another unique field is already in use

chat.welcomeDesc: Select a channel on the left to start a conversation.
chat.noMessagesHint: Send a message or attach a file to get started!
chat.inputLockedPlaceholder: Complete your profile in Settings to send messages
chat.inputLockedHint: Please fill in your student ID, faculty, and major in Settings before you can send messages.
chat.is3SystemBusy: The system is busy. A reply will be sent as soon as possible — you can keep waiting in this chat.
chat.is3NoSupporterBackground: The system is busy, please try again later
chat.technicalSupportNotice: If there is any technical problem, please email us immediately at

report.title: Report
report.successDesc: Thank you for your feedback. We will review it soon.

profile.completeDesc: Please go to Settings to add Student ID, Faculty, Major

journal.title: Journal Upload
journal.desc: Upload research journal versions for TA or AI review at each deadline. Used as context.
journal.noVersionsHint: Upload your first journal version above.
journal.dragDrop: Drag and drop file here, or click to select

supporter.selectUserToView: Select a user to view chat and journal

admin.journalRateNoOpenPeriod: No journal window is currently open. Stats appear only while a submission period is active.
admin.journalRateLoadError: Could not load stats from the server.
admin.totalSignupRateIntro: Learners registered on the site (excluding stats blacklist) versus combined theoretical roster for IS-1, IS-2, and IS-3. May exceed 100%.

statsBlacklist.intro: Accounts on this list are excluded from journal analytics (submitted counts, totals, by class) and from PRETEST/POST-TEST data on the server. Search by username or full name, then add to the list.
statsBlacklist.searchPlaceholder: Search by username or full name…
statsBlacklist.listedEmpty: No accounts in the blacklist yet.
statsBlacklist.envHint: Only accounts listed below are excluded from statistics; manage them on this page.

admin.searchPlaceholder: Search by username, full name, ID...
admin.accountsServerOnly: You are signed in as server admin: this list only shows database users (GET /api/admin/users). Demo accounts stored in the browser are not listed here. To add users, use public registration or seed the database.
admin.usersFetchFailed: Could not load accounts from the server. Check your network, admin JWT, and try refreshing.
admin.dbRoleRequiresJwt: To persist role changes to the database (user_role column), sign in as admin with a server account (JWT). Demo/local login has no API token, so role changes are not written to PostgreSQL.
admin.selectChannelHint: Select a channel to view messages
admin.selectUserToViewChat: Select a user to view their chat with AGENT
admin.testAgentChannel: Agent test channel (not as a learner)
admin.confirmDelete: Delete this account? This cannot be undone.
admin.autoReminderNoPeriod: No upcoming/active submission is available for reminders.
admin.autoReminderPlaceholder: Type a reminder to send to all not-submitted learners (as AGENT)...

chatJournal.noSubmissionLink: Not linked to a managed submission

classListPage.intro: Counts include only learners registered on the website, after excluding the stats blacklist. Theoretical class size is an estimate; signup rate can exceed 100% if enrollment surpasses it.

faq.title: FAQ management
faq.intro: Each FAQ has Vietnamese and English content (question, answer, keywords). Add, edit, or import CSV. Data is stored in PostgreSQL (faq_entries + pgvector); the chatbot picks the answer language from the user’s message when DATABASE_URL and OpenRouter are set.
faq.vectorNote: Embeddings are stored in PostgreSQL (pgvector column). No separate vector DB service. The chatbot needs DATABASE_URL + OPENROUTER_API_KEY to sync and query.
faq.validationRequired: Fill in question and answer for both Vietnamese and English.
faq.searchNoResults: No FAQ entries match your search.

surveys.title: Survey results
surveys.intro: View learner submissions by survey type. PRETEST is live; POST-TEST uses the same storage (survey_kind) and will appear here after you enable it on the server and add the learner flow.
surveys.introStats: Aggregated answers across all submissions for this survey (no per-user table). Section B counts each time a topic was used (first or second pick). Accounts on the Blacklist under Account management are already excluded from this data on the server.
surveys.posttestHint: POST-TEST: set SURVEY_POSTTEST_ENABLED=1 on the backend when ready, then add validation and UI (same table as PRETEST, survey_kind = POSTTEST).
surveys.empty: No submissions for this survey yet.

stats.topicNote: Each topic block includes all submissions where learners chose that topic (as first or second). Totals per question match the number of responses above.
stats.freeTextHint: Answers vary; see sample responses below (not charted).
stats.aiPurposeSamples: Primary AI purpose (free text) — sample answers ({count} in total, showing up to 25)

aKeys.aiStudyPurpose: 14. Primary purpose (free text) — see list below

submissions.title: Manage Submissions
submissions.desc: Create and manage journal submission rounds. When deadline ends, users move to a new submission.
submissions.confirmDelete: Delete this submission period? Periods with uploads cannot be removed (delete uploads first or keep the period).
submissions.noClassBreakdown: No per-class row: students may have no class set in the database, or there are no learners yet.

pretest.title: PRETEST survey
pretest.subtitle: Required before using the app · English is primary; Vietnamese shown as support

intro.en: Welcome. This questionnaire follows the course PRETEST (background, two technical topics you choose, and AI attitudes). Your answers are stored securely for research and course improvement.
intro.vi: Chào bạn. Bộ câu hỏi này theo PRETEST khóa học (phần nền, hai chủ đề kỹ thuật bạn chọn, và thái độ với AI). Câu trả lời được lưu an toàn phục vụ nghiên cứu và cải thiện học phần.

pretest.blocker: You must complete this survey to access chats and course tools.

sectionA.title: Section A: Background information
sectionA.subtitleVi: Phần A: Thông tin nền (tiếng Anh chính; tiếng Việt hỗ trợ)

sectionC.title: Section C: AI attitudes & readiness
sectionC.instructions: Rate each statement from 1 (Strongly disagree) to 5 (Strongly agree).
sectionC.instructionsVi: Mức đồng ý từ 1 (Hoàn toàn không đồng ý) đến 5 (Hoàn toàn đồng ý).

validation.sectionA: Please complete all fields in Section A and choose two different topics.
validation.sectionB: Please answer every question in this section (including open-ended items).
validation.sectionC: Please choose a score from 1 to 5 for each statement.

pretest.submitError: Could not save. Check your connection or contact support.
